hero.title: Full-Stack Developer
hero.subtitle: I build scalable web applications with over 4 years of frontend and backend experience. I am currently focused on Belcorp initiatives, driving legacy modernization, regional updates, and critical migrations with React, Node.js, .NET, and SQL Server.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Full Stack Software Developer
about.paragraph1: Software Developer with over 4 years of frontend and backend experience, focused on building scalable, maintainable, and business-oriented web applications. I work across React, Next.js, Node.js, Python, and .NET ecosystems, combining product delivery with continuous improvement and technical modernization.
about.paragraph2: My recent work has been centered on Belcorp, contributing to product evolution, production support, and functional improvements with a strong focus on stability, performance, and operational continuity.
about.paragraph3: I specialize in automation-heavy delivery: workflow orchestration, notification pipelines, SQL optimization, and maintainable integrations across React, Node.js, and .NET stacks. I combine strong product judgment, clean architecture, and reliable execution for production-critical systems.

highlights.modernDesc: Bolivia in .NET 4.5 and Colombia in Node.js
highlights.leadDesc: Hands-on execution across automation, integrations, and product continuity

about.highlightDesc: My research on Blockchain and FHIR HL7 for electronic health record interoperability was published in an international Q2 journal (DOI: 10.3991/ijoe.v20i03.44507), demonstrating my ability to combine technology and innovation in real-impact solutions.

projects.title: My Projects
projects.githubCtaText: Find more projects and contributions on my GitHub profile. I'm always working on something new and interesting.

professional.title: Join Belcorp
professional.description: Development and maintenance of the consultant registration platform, including automations across 12 countries, SQL Server Store Procedure optimization, Bolivia bureau changes on .NET Framework 4.5, and support for the migration of Colombia's traditional flow into Node.js.

professional.title: Rimac Monitoring Center
professional.description: Real-time monitoring platform for insurance with mobile-first responsive interfaces. Led migration from Redux to Zustand and updates to Node.js (14→18) and Ant Design (v3→v5). Developed advanced geospatial solutions with React-Leaflet and TimeDimension.

professional.title: HolaLink
professional.description: Innovative web platform with serverless API on AWS Lambda, secure authentication with AWS Amplify, and mobile-first designs. Strengthened validation with Yup, Formik, and JOI, increasing test coverage with Jest.

professional.title: Lucy System
professional.description: Robust web system developed with Django for business management. Led complete backend and frontend development, implementing real-time communication with WebSockets.

professional.title: Fractal Platform
professional.description: Development of scalable APIs with .NET Core and dynamic views with Razor (SSR). Implemented real-time communication functions with Slack API and WebSockets for business collaboration.

personal.title: MCA Makeup
personal.description: Full web platform for a professional makeup artist with online booking, real-time availability, testimonials, complaint book, and an admin panel for services, calendar, income, and reports.

personal.title: Chicama Map
personal.description: Map and directory of useful places in Puerto Chicama and Malabrigo, with a public discovery flow and an admin panel to create, edit, and organize points of interest with bilingual support.

personal.title: Personal Finances
personal.description: Full-stack personal finance app with JWT authentication, expense dashboard, categories, transactions, budgets, and a clean separation between frontend and API.

personal.title: Peru in Map
personal.description: Discovery-focused monorepo for places in Peru with Astro + React on the frontend, Hono on the backend, and a product-oriented architecture around maps, reviews, admin flows, and PWA behavior.

personal.title: GitHub Profile Fetcher
personal.description: Small API built with Elysia and Bun to fetch public GitHub profiles with in-memory caching, structured logging, and cache clearing endpoints for development.

personal.title: Carioca Game Web
personal.description: Frontend experiment to bring a card-game experience into the browser with a dedicated interface and a structure optimized for fast interaction.

Led migration from Redux to Zustand, improving performance and maintainability
Implemented modular components and custom hooks, ensuring scalability
Managed key updates: Node.js (14→18) and Ant Design (v3→v5)
Developed geospatial solutions with React-Leaflet, integrating TimeDimension and multiple layers from Geoserver
Implemented serverless API on AWS Lambda with secure authentication through AWS Amplify
Strengthened data validation with Yup, Formik, and JOI
Increased test coverage with Jest, improving reliability
Contributed to the development of a mobile-adapted mapping platform with reusable components
Developed scalable APIs with .NET Core and AJAX
Implemented dynamic views with Razor (SSR)
Created real-time communication functions with Slack API + WebSockets
Led the development of 'Lucy', a robust web system with Django
Developed a custom website for Unicon with WordPress, SASS, and PHP
Implemented real-time communication systems with WebSockets
